title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCIV. Lullabies.
content:
Where was a sugar and fretty?
            And where was jewel and spicy?
        Hush-a-bye, babe in a cradle,
            And we'll go away in a tricy!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCIV. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
